title: Help me create a new quote for a client in Workroo…

messages.content:
Hello! I'm **MAX**, your Empire AI Assistant.

_Tip: Ctrl+V to paste images · Shift+Enter for newlines_
Help me create a new quote for a client in WorkroomForge. green pallet colors, headboard for bed channel back , linen drapes, motorized, reupholster cench

Let me analyze this image and open the Quote Builder with everything pre-filled!

**📸 Image Analysis:**
Beautiful luxury bedroom — I can see:
- Floor-to-ceiling drapery panels (2 windows visible) with sheer underlayers
- Tufted/channel-back upholstered headboard (king size, very tall ~72" height)
- Upholstered bench at foot of bed (needs reupholstery)
- Elegant, high-end finish throughout

Now translating to **green palette** as requested and building the quote...

```tool
{"tool": "open_quote_builder", "customer_name": "New Client", "customer_email": "", "customer_phone": "", "customer_address": "", "project_name": "Luxury Bedroom — Green Palette", "rooms": [{"name": "Master Bedroom", "windows": [{"name": "Left Window", "width": 84, "height": 108, "quantity": 1, "treatmentType": "ripplefold", "liningType": "blackout", "hardwareType": "track-ripplefold", "motorization": "smart", "mountType": "ceiling"}, {"name": "Right Window", "width": 84, "height": 108, "quantity": 1, "treatmentType": "ripplefold", "liningType": "blackout", "hardwareType": "track-ripplefold", "motorization": "smart", "mountType": "ceiling"}], "upholstery": [{"name": "Channel-Back Headboard (King)", "type": "headboard", "width": 80, "height": 72, "quantity": 1, "fabricYards": 12, "notes": "Channel tufting detail, king size, tall profile ~72in height. Green linen or velvet blend recommended."}, {"name": "Bench Reupholster", "type": "bench", "width": 60, "height": 20, "quantity": 1, "fabricYards": 5, "notes": "Foot-of-bed bench reupholstery. Match headboard fabric in coordinating green tone."}]}], "max_analysis": "This is a stunning high-end bedroom project in a sophisticated green palette. I recommend a sage or forest green performance linen for the floor-to-ceiling ripplefold draperies with blackout lining and Lutron smart motorization for seamless control. The channel-back headboard should be executed in a complementary deep emerald or moss green velvet for texture contrast, with the bench reupholstered in a tonal fabric — perhaps a sage linen weave to tie the palette together. Hardware should be ceiling-mounted ripplefold track for a clean, architectural look consistent with the room's refined aesthetic."}
```

upholstery.name: Channel-Back Headboard (King)
upholstery.notes: Channel tufting detail, king size, tall profile ~72in height. Green linen or velvet blend recommended.

upholstery.name: Bench Reupholster
upholstery.notes: Foot-of-bed bench reupholstery. Match headboard fabric in coordinating green tone.

result.max_analysis: This is a stunning high-end bedroom project in a sophisticated green palette. I recommend a sage or forest green performance linen for the floor-to-ceiling ripplefold draperies with blackout lining and Lutron smart motorization for seamless control. The channel-back headboard should be executed in a complementary deep emerald or moss green velvet for texture contrast, with the bench reupholstered in a tonal fabric — perhaps a sage linen weave to tie the palette together. Hardware should be ceiling-mounted ripplefold track for a clean, architectural look consistent with the room's refined aesthetic.
